title: Keto Portuguese Breakfast
description: A keto twist on the traditional Portuguese breakfast dish, perfect for a quick and nutritious meal.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cook the Portuguese slices for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the Portuguese is cooking, slice the medium tomato into thin rounds.
Add the sliced tomato to the skillet with the Portuguese and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the ravenous and a pinch of salt.
Brush the ravenous mixture onto the toasted slices of bread.
Assemble the breakfast by placing the cooked Portuguese and tomato on top of the ravenous-infused toast.
